Addon Sub type:
Invoice Comparison Logic Summary
1. Overview
The system compares OCR-extracted invoice data (Verifi/Nitor) against Ground Truth data (OnCare) to calculate
accuracy percentages.
2. Value Comparison Rules ( isEqual function)
The isEqual helper is used for most scalar field comparisons.
Treats null, undefined, '', and 0 as empty values.
If ground truth is empty, the field is automatically considered a match.
Strips commas and $ symbols before numeric comparison.
Example: "2,715.70" matches 2715.7.
Uses parseFloat for numeric comparison; if numeric comparison fails, falls back to a string comparison.
3. Header/Footer Fields Comparison
(80% of Invoice Field score)
3.1 Fields Compared (9)
The following 9 header/footer fields contribute to the Header/Footer Fields Score:
Invoice Number → isEqual (handles empty ground truth)
Invoice Date → isEqual
Customer Purchase Order → isEqual
Customer Number (Source) vs Account Number (Ground Truth) → isEqual
Vendor Name → Fuzzy match (≥ 90% similarity threshold)

3.text: Facility Name / ShipTo Name(ShipToAddress.Name) → Fuzzy match (≥ 90% similarity threshold) → Fallback to
BillTo name is ShipTo name is NULL
Due Date is displayed but excluded from accuracy calculation (isMatch: null).
Invoice Count is not part of per-invoice comparison. It is handled at the document level via the invoice count
Addons are matched by AddonSubType using fuzzy string matching (≥ 50% similarity threshold)
Best match is selected when multiple candidates exist
If no addons exist in both source and ground truth, the Footer Addons score = 100%.
For each line item matched by LineNumber:
5.1 Line Item Fields (80% of Line Item score)
Item Name → Fuzzy match (≥ 80% similarity, first 50 characters only)

4.text: 5.2 Line Item Addons (20% of Line Item score)
Matched by AddonSubType using fuzzy string matching (≥ 50% similarity threshold)
If no line item addons exist, Line Item Addons score = 100%.
To aggregate line item scores at invoice level:
Uses max(groundTruthLineItemCount, sourceLineItemCount) as the divisor.
Missing line items (source has fewer than ground truth)
Extra line items (source has more than ground truth)
4 (or 100% if no line items in either)

5.text:
Component | Weight in Parent | Overall Weight
Header/Footer Fields | 80% of Invoice Field | 32%
Footer Addons | 20% of Invoice Field | 8%
Line Item Fields | 80% of Line Items | 48%
Line Item Addons | 20% of Line Items | 12%
Invoice Field Match | 40% of Final | 40%
Line Items Average | 60% of Final | 60%
Document-level scoring aggregates all invoices within a document.
